---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for sherlog
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is painful or impossible today?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. If it touches the debug loop,
describe where it fits (hypotheses, probes, runs, evidence, cleanup).

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Scope

- [ ] Daemon (ingest, storage, query, await)
- [ ] MCP tools
- [ ] `/debug` skill
- [ ] Case Board UI
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Docs / distribution

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other tools, or anything else that helps.
